pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 1.8 to 11 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile against Java 11 APIs and bytecode; keeping 1.8 would result in a mismatch with the target runtime or prevent usage of Java 11 features if enabled elsewhere.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade JaCoCo Maven plugin to a version compatible with Java 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JaCoCo versions (like 0.7.5) do not support Java 11 bytecode and will fail at runtime or during instrumentation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Inject API dependency to replace javax.inject.
pom.xml.why_exists: Java 11 removed Java EE modules (including javax.inject) from the JDK; code using these annotations requires the explicit Jakarta dependency to compile.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Annotation API dependency to replace javax.annotation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Java 11 removed Java EE modules (including javax.annotation) from the JDK; code using these annotations requires the explicit Jakarta dependency to compile.
